response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title 'Hyper Jumpin'' from on-screen text during the performance. Identified the performers as the virtual YouTuber group 'Hololive 5th Generation' (also known as NePoLaBo). Used the search query '"Hyper Jumpin'" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. The video structure consists of an intro (00:00-02:08), the main song performance (02:08-04:42), and an outro with event information (04:42-05:04).
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip featuring a musical performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the virtual YouTuber group Hololive 5th Generation (NePoLaBo), with an introductory and concluding segment containing event information.

scenes.description: Introductory graphic featuring the Hololive 5th Generation members and event title.
The Hololive 5th Generation members perform the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' on a virtual stage.
